query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
updatedAt	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
invoiceType	enum('factura','abono')	NO	factura
paymentMethod	enum('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro')	YES	redsys
paymentValidatedBy	int	YES	NULL
paymentValidatedAt	datetime	YES	NULL
transferProofUrl	text	YES	NULL
transferProofKey	text	YES	NULL
isAutomatic	tinyint(1)	NO	1
creditNoteForId	int	YES	NULL
creditNoteReason	text	YES	NULL
sentAt	datetime	YES	NULL
lastSentAt	datetime	YES	NULL
sentCount	int	NO	0
